evidence.scientific_clarity: Two-panel ROC+PRC figure clearly shows all 4 classifiers with AUROC/AP annotations in legend; diagonal and prevalence baselines present as required by brief.
evidence.typography: Script uses matplotlib default font (DejaVuSans) without setting pdf.fonttype=42; pdffonts confirms Type 3 (bitmap) fonts rather than Type 42 (TrueType) selectable text.
evidence.palette: Colors avoid red/green directional confusion; uses grey, blue, orange, green — reasonably colorblind-safe (blue/orange distinction is OK for deuteranopia) but green (#2DB37B) vs orange (#E87A4C) can be problematic for some CVD types; no explicit CVD-safe palette like Okabe-Ito used.
evidence.layout_density: Square-aspect equal axes fill the 7x3.2in figure well; wspace=0.32 is appropriate; no gaping whitespace; legends fit within panels without overlap.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption fully matches figure content; suptitle is redundant with caption title; legend entries only show AUROC on ROC panel and AP on PRC panel rather than both metrics in each legend (brief says 'AUROC and AP per method in legend').
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF uses Type 3 (bitmap) fonts — pdffonts shows DejaVuSans as Type 3, not Type 42; script does not set matplotlib.rcParams['pdf.fonttype']=42, so text is not selectable/editable in the PDF.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg, caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all exist and are non-trivial; brief only required .pdf and .png but extras are present.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption clearly explains both panels, identifies reference lines with quantitative prevalence (pi=0.40, n+=120, n-=180), and reports specific numerical findings for all four classifiers with AUROC and AP values.

overall_strengths: Scientifically complete: both ROC and PRC curves with correct reference lines, four classifiers, and per-method metrics in legends matching the brief exactly.
Caption is thorough with specific numerical claims (AUROC and AP for all four methods), quantified prevalence baseline, and clear panel descriptions.
overall_weaknesses: PDF text is not selectable/editable — script omits pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype='none', producing Type 3 bitmap fonts instead of embedded TrueType (Type 42), failing the vector fidelity requirement.
Default DejaVuSans font used without explicit font choice; legend shows AUROC only on ROC panel and AP only on PRC panel, whereas the brief requests both metrics per method in each legend entry.
